# Rasteret

> Index-first access to cloud-native GeoTIFF collections for ML and analysis. A growing catalog of pre-registered datasets, multi-cloud (S3/Azure/GCS), up to 20x faster reads.

Index-first access to cloud-native GeoTIFF collections for ML and analysis. A growing catalog of pre-registered datasets, multi-cloud (S3/Azure/GCS), up to 20x faster reads.

## Getting Started

- [Getting Started](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/getting-started/index.md)

## How-To Guides

- [How-To Guides](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/how-to/index.md)
- [AEF Embeddings](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/how-to/aef-embeddings/index.md)
- [Build from Parquet and Arrow Tables](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/how-to/build-from-tables/index.md)
- [Collection Management](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/how-to/collection-management/index.md)
- [Custom Cloud Provider](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/how-to/custom-cloud-provider/index.md)
- [Dataset Catalog](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/how-to/dataset-catalog/index.md)
- [Bring Your Own AOIs, Points, And Metadata](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/how-to/enriched-collection-workflows/index.md)
- [Migrating from Rasterio](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/how-to/migrating-from-rasterio/index.md)
- [Multi-Dataset Training](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/how-to/multi-dataset-training/index.md)
- [Point Sampling and Masking](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/how-to/point-sampling-and-masking/index.md)
- [TorchGeo Integration](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/how-to/torchgeo-integration/index.md)

- [Work With Collection Tables](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/tutorials/03_work_with_collection_tables/index.md)
- [Custom Datasets With Rasteret](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/tutorials/04_custom_datasets_with_rasteret/index.md)
- [TorchGeo Benchmark: Rasteret vs Native Rasterio](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/tutorials/05_torchgeo_benchmark_rasteret_vs_rasterio/index.md)

- [RasterAccessor](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/reference/core/raster_accessor/index.md)
- [Utilities](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/reference/core/utils/index.md)
- [COG Reader](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/reference/fetch/cog/index.md)
- [Header Parser](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/reference/fetch/header_parser/index.md)
- [rasteret.ingest](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/reference/ingest/index.md)
- [COG Enrichment](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/reference/ingest/enrich/index.md)
- [Normalize](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/reference/ingest/normalize/index.md)
- [Record Table](https://terrafloww.github.io/rasteret/reference/ingest/parquet_record_table/index.md)
